lineage.Process: ExportFeatures Limites "C:\OXFAM 2ndo\CATASTRO\Sindicatos.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "OBJECTID "OBJECTID" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,Limites,OBJECTID,-1,-1;DEPARTAMEN "DEPARTAMEN" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,DEPARTAMEN,0,254;PROVINCIA "PROVINCIA" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,PROVINCIA,0,254;MUNICIPIO "MUNICIPIO" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,MUNICIPIO,0,254;POL "POL" true true false 7 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,POL,0,7;OID_ "OID_" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,Limites,OID_,-1,-1;POL_1 "POL_1" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,POL_1,0,8;FEDERACION "FEDERACION" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,FEDERACION,0,15;CENTRAL "CENTRAL" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,CENTRAL,0,20;SINDICATO "SINDICATO" true true false 25 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,SINDICATO,0,25;BASE_PDAR_ "BASE_PDAR_" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,BASE_PDAR_,0,8;MUNICIPIO_ "MUNICIPIO_" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,MUNICIPIO_,0,15;PROVINCIA_ "PROVINCIA_" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,PROVINCIA_,0,15;MICROREGIO "MICROREGIO" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,MICROREGIO,0,15;AUTO_ID "AUTO_ID" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Limites,AUTO_ID,-1,-1;DISTRITOS "DISTRITOS" true true false 30 Text 0 0,First,#,Limites,DISTRITOS,0,30;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Limites,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Limites,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

ExportFeatures Sindicatos "C:\OXFAM 2ndo\CATASTRO\Sindicatos_Shinahota.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "OBJECTID "OBJECTID" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,Sindicatos,OBJECTID,-1,-1;DEPARTAMEN "DEPARTAMEN" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,DEPARTAMEN,0,254;PROVINCIA "PROVINCIA" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,PROVINCIA,0,254;MUNICIPIO "MUNICIPIO" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,MUNICIPIO,0,254;POL "POL" true true false 7 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,POL,0,7;OID_ "OID_" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,Sindicatos,OID_,-1,-1;POL_1 "POL_1" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,POL_1,0,8;FEDERACION "FEDERACION" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,FEDERACION,0,15;CENTRAL "CENTRAL" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,CENTRAL,0,20;SINDICATO "SINDICATO" true true false 25 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,SINDICATO,0,25;BASE_PDAR_ "BASE_PDAR_" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,BASE_PDAR_,0,8;MUNICIPIO_ "MUNICIPIO_" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,MUNICIPIO_,0,15;PROVINCIA_ "PROVINCIA_" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,PROVINCIA_,0,15;MICROREGIO "MICROREGIO" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,MICROREGIO,0,15;AUTO_ID "AUTO_ID" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,AUTO_ID,-1,-1;DISTRITOS "DISTRITOS" true true false 30 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,DISTRITOS,0,30;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

ExportFeatures Sindicatos_Shinahota C:\Geoportal_Catastro\Shapefiles\Sindicatos.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "SINDICATO "SINDICATO" true true false 25 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,SINDICATO,0,25;OBJECTID "OBJECTID" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,OBJECTID,-1,-1;DEPARTAMEN "DEPARTAMEN" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,DEPARTAMEN,0,254;PROVINCIA "PROVINCIA" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,PROVINCIA,0,254;MUNICIPIO "MUNICIPIO" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,MUNICIPIO,0,254;POL "POL" true true false 7 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,POL,0,7;OID_ "OID_" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,OID_,-1,-1;POL_1 "POL_1" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,POL_1,0,8;FEDERACION "FEDERACION" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,FEDERACION,0,15;CENTRAL "CENTRAL" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,CENTRAL,0,20;BASE_PDAR_ "BASE_PDAR_" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,BASE_PDAR_,0,8;MUNICIPIO_ "MUNICIPIO_" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,MUNICIPIO_,0,15;PROVINCIA_ "PROVINCIA_" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,PROVINCIA_,0,15;MICROREGIO "MICROREGIO" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,MICROREGIO,0,15;AUTO_ID "AUTO_ID" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,AUTO_ID,-1,-1;DISTRITOS "DISTRITOS" true true false 30 Text 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,DISTRITOS,0,30;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Sindicatos_Shinahota,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
